node.statement: E1 (left, l-term). l:=h_{p,b}=p‚ąėb-P(p‚ąėb) where p=P(a^2) in A=Im P and b in A (def square-hole, def near-fixed-algebra). (i) l in Ker P: P(l)=P(p‚ąėb)-P^2(p‚ąėb)=P(p‚ąėb)-P(p‚ąėb)=0 since P^2=P (GT-Pprops). (ii) Norm: ||l||<=||p‚ąėb||+||P(p‚ąėb)||<=||p‚ąėb||+(1+C eta)||p‚ąėb||<=C||p‚ąėb||<=C||p||||b||<=C||a||^2||b|| (triangle inequality; GT-Pprops ||P||<=1+C eta; GT-jb-submult ||p‚ąėb||<=||p||||b||; node-1.1 bound ||p||<=C||a||^2). (iii) Apply GT-FI (first insertion) with n=l in Ker P and c=a in A: ||P(l‚ąėa)||<=C sqrt(eta)||l||||a||<=C sqrt(eta)¬∑C||a||^2||b||¬∑||a||=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. CONCLUSION: ||P(l‚ąėa)||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Uses GT-FI, GT-Pprops, GT-jb-submult, def square-hole, def near-fixed-algebra.
